title: taraxacum grossum
intro: Taraxacum grossum, also known as the Greater Dandelion or Taraxacum officinalis ssp. grossum, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its larger leaves and yellow flowers compared to its smaller relative, the common dandelion. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum grossum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
